companies.name: Alliance Vision
companies.shortDescription:
Alliance Vision. # Alliance Vision

Alliance Vision is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Distributeur d'équipements et solutions de vision industrielle. Alliance Vision employs 4 people (+66.7% YoY, +4 people), founded in 1997. Headquartered in France, with presence in India.

## About
As a partner to the major vision equipment manufacturers, we provide adapted solutions in fields where machine vision is used as a means to visualise, qualify, measure, test and control. 

Our expertise covers design (dedicated design office), equipment distribution, training and software publishing. 

In industry, this involves the complete manufacturing process: measurements, sorting, quality control, production automation, traceability, etc. 

In research, scientific machine vision covers a broad spectrum: medical research, the study of materials, solid state physics, atomic energy, fluid mechanics, aeronautics, space, etc.

## Company Details

They provide solutions dedicated to the process of quality, traceability, and even the slightest visual defect matter. V-Optics employs 7 people (-25.0% YoY, -4 people), founded in 2018. Headquartered in France.
[...]
V-OPTICS offers unique vision systems for surfaces inspection. Reliable, repeatable and accurate, our non-destructive testing machines and sensors are adapted either to manufacturing or laboratories environments.
[...]
Our devices have a proven track record for MEDICAL laboratories (on all lenses, knee and hip prosthesis), the GLASS industry, & the TRANSPORT sector (automotive, aeronautics) on metal, composite and plastic parts.
[...]
We automate your inspection process and bring objectivity to the verdicts: detection and measurement of scratches, tooling marks, union lines, shrink marks, waviness, paint defects (orange peel, drips)...

companies.name: IN
companies.shortDescription:
IN-CORE Systèmes. IN-CORE Systèmes is a Mechanical Or Industrial Engineering company. In-Core Systèmes is a leading technology company that specializes in imaging systems and optical methods for 100% surface inspection. IN-CORE Systèmes employs 23 people (+8.6% YoY, +3 people), founded in 1998. Headquartered in Chassieu, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, with presence in Ireland.
[...]
IN-CORE Systèmes is a leading technology company, whose expertise is concentrated around imaging systems and optical methods for 100% surface inspection of continuous processes.
[...]
The core activity of the company is to design and manufacture automatic surface inspection systems based on line scan cameras, high performance illumination and computer technology with its proprietary process software.
[...]
We want to establish long term customer relations flexibly fulfilling the individual requirements. We want to optimize quality, productivity and production process by reducing waste, non-quality cost and rejects.
[...]
IN-CORE Systèmes est une entreprise française de haute technologie dans le milieu de la vision industrielle. Son expertise repose sur l’acquisition d’images en temps réel et sur un savoir-faire issu de méthodes optiques permettant une inspection de 100% de la matière en surface pour un processus de fabrication en continu (roule à roule, roule à feuille, feuille à feuille).

companies.name: PROCID
companies.shortDescription:
PROCID. PROCID is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. PROCID is a creator of vision solutions, specializing in industrial control, robotic guiding, traceability, identification, mobility applications, and impression and marquage. They have over 35 years of experience in industrial vision and use artificial intelligence to detect and classify anomalies without the need for specific descriptions. PROCID employs 4 people (+16.7% YoY, +1 person), founded in 2014. Headquartered in France.
[...]
PROCID est spécialisée dans la fourniture et l'intégration de solutions de traçabilité professionnelle et de vision industrielle.
[...]
Basée à proximité de Nancy, PROCID regroupe une équipe d’ingénieurs et de techniciens confirmés, s’appuyant sur une expérience réussie de plus de vingt ans dans les domaines de la Traçabilité et de la Vision Industrielle.
[...]
PROCID propose des solutions, qui vont de la fourniture matérielle, ou du développement logiciel, à la réalisation d'un système complet clé en main.
[...]
PROCID s'adresse non seulement aux secteurs industriel, logistique et tertiaire, mais aussi aux intégrateurs d'automatismes et constructeurs de machines ou d'équipements, désireux de faire confiance à un partenaire spécialisé.
[...]

IRIS Inspection machines. IRIS Inspection machines is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. IRIS Inspection machines is a company that specializes in the production of intelligent body inspection machines. The company focuses on reducing human intervention and providing a user-friendly format for their machines. They aim to improve productivity and reduce dependence on human intervention. companies.name: Arck Sensor
companies.shortDescription:
Arck Sensor. Arck Sensor is a Industrial Machinery Manufacturing company. arck sensor delivers robust and accurate sensing solutions for demanding industries, including inline inspection and crane operations. They provide reliable sensing technologies for safer, smarter, and more efficient lifting operations. Arck Sensor employs 16 people (+28.6% YoY, +6 people), founded in 2005. Headquartered in Ramonville-Saint-Agne, Occitanie, France, with presence in Thailand.
[...]
Arck Sensor is a French leader in optical measurement solutions for demanding industrial environments, with a commitment to robust and accurate technology. Our industrial sensors provide accurate control and measurement solutions tailored to heavy industries, where durability and precision are paramount.
 
Our expertise spans three core areas:
[...]
📦 Crane automation and operational safety at container terminals, ensuring efficiency and productivity gains.
[...]
🏗️ Automation of lifting equipment and workshop safety in heavy industries, enhancing operational accuracy and safety.
[...]
🔍 Automatic, on-line inspection of flat-rolled metal products, optimizing quality control with real-time precision.
 
Through our cutting-edge solutions, clients achieve significant productivity gains, increased measurement accuracy, and enhanced safety for their operations. ⚙️
